notes.text: Check for damage and leaks. Check pad thickness and brake fluid level.
Check for damage and leaks. Check pad thickness and brake fluid level.
If tires are different sizes, do not rotate front to rear.
Asymmetric tires cannot be rotated from side to side. Follow the OEM tire rotation specification.
Check tread wear and inflation pressure, including spare.

Inspect tread wear, rotate tires if necessary. Do not rotate tires front to back if tires are not the same size. If tires are directional do not rotate side to side. Follow the manufacturer's tire rotation pattern.
Check tread wear and inflation pressure, including spare.

Inspect tread wear, rotate tires if necessary. Do not rotate tires front to back if tires are not the same size. If tires are directional do not rotate side to side. Follow the manufacturer's tire rotation pattern.
Check for excessive play. Check dust seals as well.
Check function of horn as well.
Check braking, kick-down, steering, electrical, heating and ventilation systems, air conditioning, (ASL) Automatic Shift Lock, and power accessories.
